name: kicad-context
description: Read-only MCP server for understanding KiCad projects
long_description: Point it at a KiCad project and an agent can answer what the board is and what's wrong with it, without loading the whole design into context. Seven read-only tools with hard output budgets. Self-contained binary; requires KiCad 10+ (kicad-cli) on the system.

kicad_cli.title: Path to kicad-cli (optional)
kicad_cli.description: Leave blank to auto-detect (/Applications/KiCad or ~/Applications). Set only if kicad-cli is installed elsewhere.
